findings.quote: calm oysters lay more nacre, but the pearls that sell are the round ones, and roundness comes from measured disturbance, not stillness
findings.note: Two options eliminable by form: C proposes an unhinted cull/reseed action; D is a bare definition unlikely to be the 'mainly about' of an argumentative set. Leaves B as the only compound 'X but actually Y' thesis, narrowing to a lean without the passage (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: would have gone on adding thickness without any limit at all
findings.note: B is an infinite-growth overclaim no expository text asserts, and C ('no gain at all') is an absolute contradicting the comparative premise; both eliminable by form, leaving A vs D undecided (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: reaching its very best in the leases where the oysters were left most completely alone
findings.note: B contradicts the option-set's evident thesis and A's 'collapsed almost at once' is an extreme; both eliminable by form, leaving the nuanced C as the lean (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: only constant handling can make a pearl round, and any oyster left in peace for long is bound to build a worthless, lumpy coat
findings.note: Absolutes in B and an off-topic new mechanism in A (cooler/cleaner water) are eliminable by form, leaving D (the on-topic mechanistic option) as the lean (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: Qualified: she grants that handling costs real growth and too much ruins the crop
findings.note: Attitude spectrum where B is the only hedged option among committed stances (A sympathetic, C convinced, D dismissive); the 'only qualified option' construction lets a no-domain reader lean B. Flag not kill, as a qualified attitude key is normal design.

findings.quote: To make each guest's card stop working once they left, so a copied or unreturned credential could no longer open the room
findings.note: World knowledge of recodable keycard-lock history (the security/expiring-credential motive, cf. VingCard 1975-76) points to B; A is the 'obvious convenience' answer the framing rejects. C/D are substantive aims, so key not decided by form alone (WORLD_KNOWLEDGE).

findings.quote: The grit and salt that traffic drags over the line, together with snowplough blades, rather than its age or tyres running over it
findings.note: A is the comprehensive option that names and rebuts B (tyres) and C (age) directly; combined with general knowledge of road-marking abrasion this leans A without the passage (WORLD/partial).

findings.quote: Där en bryggare köpte humlen på plats dröjde sig gårdarna kvar längre in på seklet, men främst på den torra, väldränerade jorden
findings.note: B and C are near-twins differing only by the soil qualifier; the qualified-vs-unqualified-twin construction leans B, while D is a method-not-result and A reverses causation. Narrows without the passage (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: Landskapslagarna krävde sedan medeltiden att varje hemman höll en humlegård med bestämt antal stänger, annars hotade böter
findings.note: World knowledge of Swedish landskapslagar (medieval hop-cultivation duty) points to C; D is anachronistic (a medieval duty framed as an anti-import measure) and eliminable by logic (WORLD_KNOWLEDGE).

findings.quote: På åsjorden rann vätan undan, så rötterna skadades mindre och skörden slog mer sällan fel
findings.note: D is an absolute ('aldrig') and B contradicts the stem's premise (proximity vs soil); domain knowledge that hops suffer in waterlogged roots favors the drainage mechanism A over C (warmth). WORLD/partial.

findings.quote: En undanskymd gröda kunde leva kvar eller falla beroende på en köpare i närheten och dugande jord, och återkomsten följer samma villkor
findings.note: A and B are absolutes and C carries a wrong rationale, leaving D as the qualified thesis restatement. Form-level narrowing without the passage (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: De värst uttrampade partierna låg oftast där leden korsade blöt mark, inte där flest gick
findings.note: Counterintuitive-finding construction: B is the naive expectation and C its internal inversion, both eliminable by form, leaving A vs D as the non-naive alternatives (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: Slitaget beror mer på markens väta än på antalet vandrare, vilket gör spänger verksammare än förbud
findings.note: B is an overreach absolute ('alla besöksförbud... verkningslösa'), A a false detail (slope), D a minor caveat, leaving C as the qualified main-message option. Form-level narrowing (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: Efterfrågan på kontanter försvann inte utan samlades hos ett fåtal handlare med växande börda
findings.note: C is an absolute ('upphörde helt'), A reverses the stem's causal direction, D misstates the survey's scope, leaving B as the lean. Narrows without the passage (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: Rätten att betala kontant bör tryggas som en gemensam angelägenhet, inte lämnas åt marknaden ensam
findings.note: Op-ed stance spectrum: C and D are extremes and B a position the piece disclaims, leaving A as the measured thesis. Genre/construction lean without the passage (PARTIALLY).
